tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove npm lockfile, add astro check tooling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single unambiguous lockfile (pnpm) and a working astro check.

**Files:**
- Delete: package-lock.json
- Modify: package.json, pnpm-lock.yaml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- package-lock.json no longer tracked
- pnpm astro check exits 0
- pnpm build exits 0

**Verify:** pnpm astro check && pnpm build -> both exit 0

**Steps:** On branch docs/site-hardening-spec: git rm package-lock.json; pnpm add -D @astrojs/check typescript; verify; commit 'chore: drop npm lockfile, add astro check tooling'. Full steps: plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package-lock.json", "package.json", "pnpm-lock.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm astro check && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["package-lock.json no longer tracked", "pnpm astro check exits 0", "pnpm build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add CI workflow (PR build check)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every PR runs typecheck + build in a job named build (the name the ruleset will require).

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/ci.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Triggers on pull_request
- Job id exactly build
- All actions SHA-pinned with version comment
- permissions contents: read only

**Verify:** rg 'uses:' .github/workflows/ci.yml shows only SHA-pinned actions; build check appears on PR (Task 5).

**Steps:** Exact YAML in plan Task 2. pnpm/action-setup reads packageManager - no version input. Commit 'feat: add CI build check for pull requests'.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "rg 'uses:' .github/workflows/ci.yml | rg -v '@[0-9a-f]{40} # v'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["triggers on pull_request", "job id exactly build", "all actions SHA-pinned", "permissions contents: read only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SHA-pin actions in existing workflows
tasks.description:
**Goal:** No mutable action tags anywhere in .github/workflows/.

**Files:**
- Modify: .github/workflows/deploy.yml
- Modify: .github/workflows/visual-review-flag.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No mutable tags in uses: lines (tags only in trailing comments)
- Same majors as before (no behaviour change)

**Verify:** rg 'uses:' .github/workflows/ | rg -v '@[0-9a-f]{40} # v' -> no output

**Steps:** Exact SHA replacements listed in plan Task 3 Step 1. Commit 'security: pin all workflow actions to commit SHAs'.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/deploy.yml", ".github/workflows/visual-review-flag.yml"], "verifyCommand": "rg 'uses:' .github/workflows/ | rg -v '@[0-9a-f]{40} # v'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no mutable tags in uses: lines", "same majors as before"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add Dependabot configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Monthly grouped update PRs for npm and Actions; Dependabot maintains the SHA pins.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/dependabot.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Ecosystems npm and github-actions
- Monthly schedule, one group per ecosystem

**Verify:** file matches plan Task 4 YAML exactly

**Steps:** Exact YAML in plan Task 4. Commit 'chore: add dependabot config - monthly grouped npm and actions updates'.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/dependabot.yml"], "verifyCommand": "cat .github/dependabot.yml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm and github-actions ecosystems", "monthly schedule with one group each"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Write audit report, open and merge PR 1
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Standalone audit report committed; PR 1 (docs + CI hardening) merged with the new build check green.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/superpowers/audits/2026-07-12-security-audit.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Report has all 9 findings with severity/evidence/disposition + clean checks
- PR opened from docs/site-hardening-spec
- build check green
- PR merged (user confirms merge first)

**Verify:** gh pr checks -> build pass; gh pr view --json state -> MERGED

**Steps:** Report content verbatim in plan Task 5 Step 1. Commit 'docs: add security audit report'; push; gh pr create (body in plan); watch checks; user confirms; squash merge; back to main.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/audits/2026-07-12-security-audit.md"], "verifyCommand": "gh pr view --json state -q .state", "acceptanceCriteria": ["report complete", "PR opened", "build check green", "merged after user confirmation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Repo settings - Dependabot alerts and main ruleset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vulnerability alerts + security updates on; ruleset enforcing PR + green build on main, verified by a rejected direct push.

**USER-ORDERED GATE - NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** none (GitHub settings via gh api)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- vulnerability-alerts PUT -> 204
- Ruleset main-protection active with deletion, non_fast_forward, pull_request, required_status_checks(build)
- Direct push probe REJECTED with output captured
- Probe commit removed locally

**Verify:** probe push rejected; gh api rulesets lists main-protection active

**Steps:** Exact commands + ruleset JSON + bypass contingency in plan Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/rulesets -q '.[] | {name, enforcement}'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["alerts 204", "ruleset active with all four rules", "direct push rejected, output captured", "probe removed"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["ruleset", "main-protection", "active"], ["rejected", "GH013", "rule violations"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Fix JSON-LD escaping
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A closing script tag in frontmatter can no longer break out of the JSON-LD block.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/JsonLd.astro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Rendered JSON-LD contains the unicode escape (backslash-u003c) instead of any literal '<'
- Structured data still parses as JSON on a built page

**Verify:** python check in plan Task 7 Step 3 prints OK

**Steps:** First: git checkout main && git pull && git checkout -b feat/site-hardening. Then exact file content in plan Task 7 Step 2 (replace all '<' with the unicode escape before set:html). Commit 'security: escape < in JSON-LD output to prevent script breakout'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/JsonLd.astro"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && python check from plan Task 7 Step 3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no literal < inside rendered JSON-LD payload", "JSON still parses on built page"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Self-host GoatCounter count.js
tasks.description:
**Goal:** No third-party script origin; analytics still reports to GoatCounter.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/count.js (vendored from gc.zgo.at)
- Modify: src/layouts/Base.astro line 50

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Vendored count.js current and non-empty
- Base.astro loads /js/count.js same-origin with is:inline, async, unchanged data-goatcounter endpoint

**Verify:** pnpm build && rg 'gc zgo at' dist/ -l -> no output; rg -c 'js/count.js' dist/index.html -> >=1

**Steps:** curl -fsSL https://gc.zgo.at/count.js -o public/js/count.js; replace script tag per plan Task 8 Step 2. Commit 'security: self-host goatcounter count.js'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/count.js", "src/layouts/Base.astro"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && rg 'gc\\.zgo\\.at' dist/ -l; rg -c 'js/count.js' dist/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["vendored count.js non-empty", "script loaded same-origin", "endpoint unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Meta-tag CSP + external stylesheets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CSP meta tag on every Base-layout page; Astro told never to inline stylesheets (which the CSP would block).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/layouts/Base.astro (after viewport meta)
- Modify: astro.config.mjs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CSP meta in built HTML for all page types
- build.inlineStylesheets 'never'; no style blocks in built HTML
- Policy exactly as in plan Task 9 Step 1 (self + goatcounter endpoint in img/connect)

**Verify:** pnpm build; CSP meta count 1 in dist/index.html; no '<style' matches

**Steps:** Exact meta tag + config addition in plan Task 9. Runtime verification deferred to Task 13. Commit 'security: add meta CSP, disable stylesheet inlining'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layouts/Base.astro", "astro.config.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && rg -c 'Content-Security-Policy' dist/index.html; rg -c '<style' dist/index.html || echo 'no inline styles'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CSP meta in built HTML", "no inline style blocks", "policy exact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: 404 page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Branded 404 served by GitHub Pages instead of the platform default.

**Files:**
- Create: src/pages/404.astro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- dist/404.html built with Base layout
- Links to home, essays, notes

**Verify:** pnpm build && rg -c 'Page not found' dist/404.html -> >=1

**Steps:** Exact content in plan Task 10 Step 1. Commit 'feat: add 404 page'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pages/404.astro"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && rg -c 'Page not found' dist/404.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dist/404.html built with Base layout", "links to home, essays, notes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: security.txt and Bluesky atproto-did
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RFC 9116 security contact + Bluesky domain-handle verification file.

**Files:**
- Create: public/.well-known/security.txt
- Create: public/.well-known/atproto-did

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- security.txt: Contact mailto:barrett@bryansoron.ca, Expires 2027-07-12T00:00:00.000Z, Canonical, Preferred-Languages en
- DEFERRED by user 2026-07-13: atproto-did not shipped; security.txt only. Original: atproto-did: user's DID, single line - MUST be obtained from the user at execution time (Bluesky app -> Settings -> Handle -> 'I have my own domain'). Never guess. If unavailable: ship security.txt only, note atproto-did deferred in PR body.
- Both files in dist/.well-known/ after build

**Verify:** pnpm build && cat dist/.well-known/security.txt dist/.well-known/atproto-did

**Steps:** Exact security.txt in plan Task 11 Step 1. Commit 'feat: add security.txt and bluesky domain-handle verification'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/.well-known/security.txt", "public/.well-known/atproto-did"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && cat dist/.well-known/security.txt dist/.well-known/atproto-did", "acceptanceCriteria": ["security.txt complete", "atproto-did user-supplied or explicitly deferred", "both in dist"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Sitemap filter and og:locale
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /styleguide/ out of the sitemap; og:locale on every page.

**Files:**
- Modify: astro.config.mjs (sitemap filter)
- Modify: src/layouts/Base.astro (og:locale after og:site_name)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Built sitemap has no /styleguide/ entry
- og:locale en_CA in built HTML

**Verify:** pnpm build; rg styleguide dist/sitemap-0.xml -> no match; rg -c 'og:locale' dist/index.html -> 1

**Steps:** sitemap({ filter: (page) => !page.includes('/styleguide') }); add og:locale meta. Commit 'seo: filter styleguide from sitemap, add og:locale'.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["astro.config.mjs", "src/layouts/Base.astro"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && (rg styleguide dist/sitemap-0.xml || echo 'styleguide absent') && rg -c 'og:locale' dist/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no styleguide in sitemap", "og:locale en_CA present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Verify site PR end-to-end, merge, post-deploy checks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Zero CSP violations across every page type before merge; live site verified after deploy.

**USER-ORDERED GATE - NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** none (verification + PR bookkeeping)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pnpm preview on /, one essay, one note, /styleguide, a 404 URL, /newsletter: ZERO CSP console violations each, evidence captured
- GoatCounter request observed (network tab) and dashboard pageview confirmed by user post-deploy
- PR opened, build green, needs-visual-review label applied (expected), user visual review done, merged
- Live: security.txt 200; sitemap without styleguide; branded 404; CSP meta on live pages

**Verify:** all AC re-validated with captured output at close time

**Steps:** Full commands in plan Task 13 (preview checks, gh pr create, user review + merge, deploy watch, live curls, user confirms GoatCounter + Bluesky handle switch).

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl checks from plan Task 13 Step 4", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero CSP violations locally, evidence captured", "GoatCounter observed + user-confirmed", "PR merged after green build and user visual review", "live checks pass"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["preview", "localhost", "console"], ["live", "deploy", "barrett.bryansoron.ca"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Link checker workflow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Monthly lychee run over built HTML that upserts a single link-rot issue on failures.

**Files:**
- Create: .github/workflows/link-check.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Cron '17 9 3 * *' + workflow_dispatch
- All actions SHA-pinned
- Single-issue upsert via github-script with marker and link-rot label
- One dispatch run completed and interpreted

**Verify:** gh workflow run link-check.yml; gh run watch -> completes; failure path files/updates one issue

**Steps:** Branch feat/link-checker; exact YAML in plan Task 14 Step 1; commit 'feat: add monthly link checker with issue upsert'; PR (user confirms merge); dispatch once. False positives -> --exclude patterns; dead links -> report to user.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/link-check.yml"], "verifyCommand": "gh run list --workflow link-check.yml -L 1 --json status,conclusion", "acceptanceCriteria": ["monthly cron + dispatch", "all actions SHA-pinned", "single-issue upsert", "one dispatch run completed"]}
```
